perturbed_task_language: Pick the akita black bowl not between the plate and the ramekin and place it on the plate
perturbation_semantics: The target predicate selects the akita_black_bowl that is NOT spatially between the plate and the ramekin (the negation of the base task's 'between' relation).
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot likely picks the bowl matching the base task's 'between' relation (incorrect target) because it is prompt-blind and uses the visual prior from the original task.
strategy_notes: PERCEPTION: agentview blob-analysis on world_00.npy (z>0.93) found 6 above-table blobs including 2 right-cluster dishes at world (-0.25, 0.22) [bowl A] and (-0.20, 0.33) [bowl B], plus 1 elevated cluster at world (-0.61, 0.0) on the stove (unreachable, beyond OSC x-reach ~ -0.51). PRE-POS at (-0.20, 0.30, 1.05) parked the wrist over the right cluster; wrist image (image_wrist_02.png) showed LEFT = larger dark-interior bowl (akita_black_bowl, sampled as world (-0.18, 0.36) z=0.95) and RIGHT = smaller white-interior dish (glazed_rim_porcelain_ramekin, world (-0.20, 0.20)). DISAMBIGUATION via task RELATION: the bowl at (-0.20, 0.33) is the NOT-between candidate (it is OFF the line plate->ramekin: proj_t=0.83 on line, distance from line ~16cm); the stove bowl at (-0.61, 0.0) is also not-between but unreachable. PLATE localized from agentview depth (z=0.91-0.92 mask, x_range 0.023-0.155, y_range 0.134-0.267, center (0.089, 0.200)). PLACEMENT: applied bowl-eef y-offset (memory: eef_y = plate_y + 0.045) -> target eef (0.089, 0.245, 1.05). First attempt overshot eef_y (0.287) and the bowl landed off plate edge (libero_terminated=false). After reset + retry with the corrected y offset, release fired the On(bowl,plate) predicate. Took 1 reset + 7-command attempt. No GT coordinates used; localization purely from world_NN.npy / world_wrist_NN.npy.

pick_result.name: pick
pick_result.instruction: pick up the akita black bowl
